source.title: Scrape endpoint · Cloudflare Browser Rendering docs

summary: The /scrape endpoint extracts information for specific CSS selectors from a rendered page. It is the direct selector-driven option when /json would be overkill or too fuzzy.

purpose: Use /scrape to capture targeted elements after Browser Rendering loads the page.
Best fit: precise selector-based extraction with geometry, text, HTML, and attributes.

fields: elements: array of selector objects such as { selector: 'h1' }.

documentedResponsePattern.certaintyNote: This represents the documented response pattern at a useful level. It is not a claim that every field is always present for every element.

practicalNotes: The endpoint returns positional data, which is useful when downstream tasks care about layout as well as content.
If selectors are brittle or page intent matters more than exact DOM targeting, Stagehand or the /json endpoint may be the less painful move.

cleaning.notes: This is a compact operational summary of the documented request and response pattern, with the response shape shown as representative rather than pretending every field is universally guaranteed.
